title: libkungfu.dev
tagline: Open developer and agent substrate hub for Kungfu.

sourceBoundary.rule: The site may render product narrative and navigation, but core specs, CLI parameters, workflow inputs, release state machines, schemas, and evidence facts must come from upstream manifests.

surfaces.label: Core substrate
surfaces.summary: libkungfu, yijinjing, runtime fact ledger, spec, schema registry, vectors, and stable docs URLs.

surfaces.label: Buildchain surface
surfaces.summary: CI/CD, release governance, publish transactions, artifact evidence, web-surface deploys, and CLI/SDK observability.

stableMachineEntries.label: Site manifest
stableMachineEntries.purpose: Generated site map and source-boundary metadata.
